EVERY TIME YOU ACCELERATE IT MAKES A LOAD RATTLING NOISE & THE A.C.  WORKS WHEN IT WANTS TO ..

THE CAR HAS LOST POWER A COUPLE OF TIMES.  WHEN THE CAR'S BATTERY GOES DEAD, YOU CANNOT CLOSE EITHER DOOR ON THIS CAR.  IF YOU HAVE BAD WEATHER THERE IS A GOOD CHANCE THE INTERIOR OF THIS CAR WILL GET DAMAGED.  THERE IS AN ONE INCH GAP BETWEEN THE DOOR AND THE BODY OF THE CAR.  T

narrative.headline: What 2017 Acura Nsx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
